results.title: Islamic Emirate Pledges Continued Investment in Healthcare, Public Well-Being
results.description: KABUL: Mawlavi Abdul Salam Hanafi, Deputy Prime Minister for Administrative Affairs, said that the Islamic Emirate is committed to strengthening the country’s healthcare sector, pledging continued investment in medical infrastructure and improved quality of healthcare services nationwide. During a visit to Ali Abad Hospital and Amiri Medical Complex to assess... Source
